underlying_goal: Instalar PHP 8.0 en el proyecto usando mise sin errores de compilación
friction_detail: PHP 8.0 source compilation failed 3 times due to C23/libxml2 incompatibility before switching to Homebrew install approach
brief_summary: User couldn't install PHP 8.0 via mise's asdf-php plugin due to macOS compilation errors, and assistant resolved it by installing via Homebrew shivammathur tap and symlinking to mise.
